SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_POWER.title: Goop
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_POWER.description: Your next attack deals additional damage and triggers [gold]Consume[/gold] effects.
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_POWER.smartDescription: {IsApplierYou:Your next attack|The next attack of [orange]{ApplierName}[/orange]} deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage and triggers [gold]Consume[/gold] effects.
SLIMEBOSS-DOUSE_IN_SLIME_POWER.title: Doused in Slime
SLIMEBOSS-DOUSE_IN_SLIME_POWER.descripti: The next time you attack this enemy, your [gold]Goop[/gold] wil not be removed.
SLIMEBOSS-DOUSE_IN_SLIME_POWER.smartDesc: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} {IsApplierYou:you attack|[orange]{ApplierName}[/orange] attacks} this enemy, {IsApplierYou:your|their} [gold]Goop[/gold] wil not be removed.
SLIMEBOSS-OOZE_BATH_POWER.title: Ooze Bath
SLIMEBOSS-OOZE_BATH_POWER.description: Gains [gold]Goop[/gold] at the start of your turn.
SLIMEBOSS-OOZE_BATH_POWER.smartDescripti: Gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Goop[/gold] {IsMultiplayer:from [orange]{ApplierName} [/orange]|}at the start of your turn.
SLIMEBOSS-SLIMY_TONGUE_POWER.title: Slimy Tongue
SLIMEBOSS-FLAME_TACKLE_POWER.title: Flame Tackle
SLIMEBOSS-FLAME_TACKLE_POWER.description: "Tackle" cards deal additional damage to enemies.
SLIMEBOSS-FLAME_TACKLE_POWER.smartDescri: "Tackle" cards deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage to enemies.
SLIMEBOSS-POTENCY_POWER.title: Potency
SLIMEBOSS-POTENCY_POWER.description:
Increases the damage of ALL your Spawned Slimes.
Secondary effects increase by [blue]1[/blue] for every [blue]2[/blue] Potency (rounding up).
SLIMEBOSS-POTENCY_POWER.smartDescription:
Increases the damage of ALL your Spawned Slimes by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
Increase Secondary effects increase by [blue]{Amount2}[/blue].
SLIMEBOSS-ROLL_THROUGH_POWER.title: Roll Through
SLIMEBOSS-ROLL_THROUGH_POWER.description: You do not take damage from the next "Tackle" cards.
SLIMEBOSS-ROLL_THROUGH_POWER.smartDescri: You do not take damage from the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] "Tackle" cards.
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_ARMOR_POWER.title: Goop Armor
SLIMEBOSS-RECYCLING_POWER.title: Recycling
SLIMEBOSS-RECYCLING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Slurp[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-RECYCLING_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, [gold]Slurp[/gold]{Amount:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue]}.
SLIMEBOSS-GLUTTONY_POWER.title: Gluttony
SLIMEBOSS-GLUTTONY_POWER.description: The first time you [gold]Consume[/gold] each turn, gain a [gold]Lick[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-GLUTTONY_POWER.smartDescriptio: The first {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you [gold]Consume[/gold] each turn, gain a [gold]Lick[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-OVEREXERT_POWER.title: Overexert
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECT_THE_BOSS_POWER.title: Protect the Boss
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECT_THE_BOSS_POWER.descrip: Prevent the next time you would be damaged by an enemy attack, [gold]Absorbing[/gold] your leading Slime instead.
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECT_THE_BOSS_POWER.smartDe: Prevent the next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you would be damaged by an enemy attack, [gold]Absorbing[/gold] your leading Slime instead.
SLIMEBOSS-DUPLICATED_FORM_POWER.title: Duplicated Form
SLIMEBOSS-DUPLICATED_FORM_POWER.descript: The first card each turn that targets enemies is played twice.
SLIMEBOSS-DUPLICATED_FORM_POWER.smartDes: The first {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} each turn that {Amount:plural:targets|target} enemies {Amount:plural:is|are} played twice.
SLIMEBOSS-LEAD_BY_EXAMPLE_POWER.title: Lead by Example
SLIMEBOSS-LEAD_BY_EXAMPLE_POWER.descript: The first card you play each turn that targets enemies also [gold]Commands[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-LEAD_BY_EXAMPLE_POWER.smartDes: The first {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play each turn that {Amount:plural:targets|target} enemies also {Amount:plural:[gold]Commands[/gold]|[gold]Command[/gold]}.
SLIMEBOSS-MINION_MASTER_POWER.title: Minion Master
SLIMEBOSS-MINION_MASTER_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you play a card with [gold]Command[/gold], [gold]Command[/gold] again.
SLIMEBOSS-MINION_MASTER_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you play a card with [gold]Command[/gold], [gold]Command[/gold] {Amount:plural:again|[blue]{}[/blue] additional times}.
SLIMEBOSS-RALLY_THE_TROOPS_POWER.title: Rally the Troops
SLIMEBOSS-RALLY_THE_TROOPS_POWER.descrip: The next card played this turn triggers a [gold]Command[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-RALLY_THE_TROOPS_POWER.smartDe: The next {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} played this turn {Amount:plural:triggers|trigger} a [gold]Command[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-RECKLESSNESS_POWER.title: Recklessness
SLIMEBOSS-RECKLESSNESS_POWER.description: "Tackle" cards deal additional damage to you.
SLIMEBOSS-RECKLESSNESS_POWER.smartDescri: "Tackle" cards deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage to you.
